task_completion.description: The 'Fells Loop' track is loaded in a mapping or GIS application
task_completion.visual_evidence: A mapping or GIS application is open, showing a track named 'Fells Loop' in the layers/tracks list or displayed on the map.

task_completion.description: The track is split at its Northernmost and Southernmost points
task_completion.visual_evidence: Indications in the application that the original loop has been divided into multiple segments, specifically cut at the top (North) and bottom (South) extremes.

task_completion.description: The eastern segments are joined into a track named 'Fells East Segment'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A single continuous track named 'Fells East Segment' is visible in the track list, and the map highlights or displays only the eastern half of the original loop.

task_completion.description: The eastern segment is exported as a GPX file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog showing the file being saved to 'C:\workspace\fells_east_segment.gpx', or a File Explorer window confirming the file exists in that location.

task_completion.description: The total distance of the eastern segment is recorded in a text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., Notepad) is open showing the file 'C:\workspace\east_distance.txt' containing a numeric distance value.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical application to edit the tracks
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with a GIS/GPS GUI application to split and join tracks, rather than writing scripts or manually editing GPX XML code in a text editor.

integrity.description: The recorded distance is derived from the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent opens a properties, statistics, or measurement window in the GIS application to view the distance of the eastern segment before writing it to the text file.

integrity.description: The GPX file was generated via the application's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPX file is created using the 'Save' or 'Export' feature of the GIS application, not by manually typing XML into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected GPX output path: C:\workspace\fells_east_segment.gpx. Expected text file path: C:\workspace\east_distance.txt. Expected track name: Fells East Segment.
